value.description: Purchase value. The value must be described without using separation for decimals, e.g. to capture a value of 320.50, send 32050.

minicart.description: This field is filled with the content of the cart of the transaction, which can be obtained using [Get Orders](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/orders-api?endpoint=get-/api/oms/pvt/orders/-orderId-) or [Transaction Details](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/payments-gateway-api?endpoint=get-/api/pvt/transactions/-transactionId-) endpoints. It should only be included for transactions with split payment.

shippingDiscount.description: Discount to be applied for the shipping value.
